title: Senior Teacher - Great Learning - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Great Learning - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Great Learning, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Great Learning:
Great Learning is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
